benefitsIntro: As a food business owner, having your own app presence is no longer a luxury — it's a smart, strategic move.
benefitsWithApp: With your own app, you can:
benefitsClosing: Owning your own app means owning your customer relationships, your data, and your growth. You're no longer renting space on someone else's platform — you're building your own ecosystem where your brand comes first.

signup.helpBody: Your trading name becomes your unique URL — e.g. streetlocal.live/warung-sari. This name appears on all your links, QR codes, and promotional materials.
signup.helpWarning: This name CANNOT be changed once set. Please make sure the spelling is correct before continuing.

aboutBody:
StreetLocal is redefining how local businesses operate in a digital world.

We empower street food vendors, restaurants, property businesses, laundries, hair salons, and more with their own fully branded mobile apps — giving them the same power as big brands, without the high costs or complicated systems.

At the price of a coffee, your business can go fully digital.

No middlemen. No commissions. Just a direct connection between you and your customers.

We believe every local business deserves to own its customers, its data, and its future. That's why StreetLocal is built to be simple, powerful, and accessible — whether you're running a small warung or scaling a growing brand.

Our platforms don't just look good — they work hard. Taking orders, managing bookings, connecting with customers, and driving growth 24/7… even while you sleep.

This isn't just about technology.
It's about freedom.

Freedom to grow your business your way.
Freedom to keep more of what you earn.
Freedom to compete with anyone — no matter your size.

Our mission is simple: to help local businesses thrive in the digital age with tools that are affordable, reliable, and built for real-world success.

StreetLocal isn't just a service.
It's a smarter, simpler, more powerful way to do business.

faqs.a: Choose your plan, subscribe, and we set up your branded food app within 24 hours. You get a link to share with customers.
No! Everything is managed through a simple dashboard. If you can use WhatsApp, you can manage your app.
Yes. No contracts, no lock-in. Cancel anytime from your dashboard.
Customers open your app link, browse your menu, and checkout via WhatsApp or direct payment.

faqs.q: Do you take commission on orders?
faqs.a: Never. You keep 100% of your revenue. We only charge the monthly subscription.
Yes — your brand name, menu, prices, photos, and promotions are all under your control.

basicTagline: Your own branded food app — zero commission
basicDesc: Everything a street food vendor needs in one app. Digital menu with photos, WhatsApp ordering, delivery estimates, promo pricing, QR codes, and marketing tools. Perfect for warung, kaki lima, coffee carts, and food stalls. Set up in minutes, manage from your phone.
basicFeatures: Your own branded food ordering app
15+ theme backgrounds to match your brand
GPS delivery estimates with local rates
Shop open/close toggle — pause orders instantly
Visit Us page with map link & contact
QR code generator for your stall
Landing page with city & country display
Auto SEO — Google & social media optimised
Mobile-first PWA — works on any phone
No app store needed — instant access via link
proTagline: Your brand. Your menu. Unlimited promotion.
proDesc: Put your restaurant front and centre with your own branded ordering software. Full menu options with estimated delivery bike rates that can be set to suit any market. Set your opening hours, showcase daily deals and promo offers, and offer discounts to drive customers through your doors. Display your seating capacity, live music, entertainment venues, and outside catering services. Promote weekly events, showcase live entertainment, and run unlimited discount campaigns — all under your brand name.
proFeatures: Full menu with delivery km estimates
benefitGroup1: Zero commission — keep 100% of your revenue
Get paid directly, no waiting days for payouts
No platform fees eating into your profits
benefitGroup2: Your brand name and identity — not a marketplace
Share your app on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook & website
Link directly from Instagram bio and stories
Built-in SEO so customers find you online
benefitGroup3: Full analytics — what sells, peak hours, repeat rates
Customer reviews live on YOUR app, not next to competitors
Update menu, prices & photos instantly — no platform approval
Push notifications to customers' phones — free, no ad spend
benefitGroup4: One-tap ordering — no distractions or competitor listings
Works even when other platforms go down
Build real loyalty and lasting relationships
